name: Kajabi
shortDescription: Kajabi is an all-in-one platform for creators to sell online courses, coaching, communities, and digital products. This extension integrates with the Kajabi Public API (JSON:API) to manage sites, contacts (with tagging), offers (with grant/revoke enrollment), products and courses, tags, purchases and orders, opt-in forms, and webhooks across the sites in a Kajabi account.

actions.name: List Sites
actions.description: Lists the Kajabi sites the connected credentials can access. A Kajabi account can contain multiple sites, and most other operations are site-scoped, so use this first to discover the Site ID to pass into contact, offer, product, tag, and webhook operations. Returns each site's title and subdomain along with JSON:API pagination.

actions.name: Get Site
actions.description: Retrieves a single Kajabi site by its ID, returning its title, subdomain, and timestamps. Use List Sites to discover available Site IDs.

actions.name: List Contacts
actions.description: Lists contacts (people) for a Kajabi site, with optional full-text search and filters for name, email, and tag/offer/product membership. Returns JSON:API contact resources including name, email, phone, address, and subscription status, plus pagination. Provide a Site ID to scope results to a single site.

actions.name: Get Contact
actions.description: Retrieves a single contact by ID, returning the full JSON:API contact resource with attributes (name, email, phone, address, subscription status) and relationships (site, tags, offers). Use List Contacts to discover contact IDs.

actions.name: Create Contact
actions.description: Creates a contact on a Kajabi site. A Site ID is required so the contact is associated with the correct site. Email is required; name, phone, and address fields are optional. Returns the newly created JSON:API contact resource. Note: external_user_id is not supported at creation and only becomes available after the contact is granted an offer or makes a purchase.

actions.name: Update Contact
actions.description: Updates attributes of an existing contact by ID. Only the fields you provide are changed; empty fields are left untouched. Returns the updated JSON:API contact resource.

actions.name: Delete Contact
actions.description: Permanently deletes a contact by ID. This action cannot be undone. Returns a confirmation object with the deleted contact ID.

actions.name: Add Tag to Contact
actions.description: Adds an existing contact tag to a contact. Tags must already exist on the site (Kajabi's API does not create tags on demand) — use List Tags to find the tag ID. Returns the contact's updated list of tag resource identifiers.

actions.name: Remove Tag from Contact
actions.description: Removes a contact tag from a contact. Returns the contact's updated list of remaining tag resource identifiers. This removes the association only; the tag itself continues to exist on the site.

actions.name: List Offers
actions.description: Lists active (non-archived) offers for a Kajabi site that can be granted to contacts. Returns JSON:API offer resources including title, price, currency, payment type, and checkout URL, plus pagination. Use offer IDs with Grant Offer to Contact.

actions.name: Get Offer
actions.description: Retrieves a single offer by ID, returning its full JSON:API resource including title, price, currency, payment type, checkout URL, and its related products. Use List Offers to discover offer IDs.

actions.name: Grant Offer to Contact
actions.description: Grants an offer to a contact, enrolling them and giving access to the offer's products. If no matching customer exists, one is created from the contact's details. By default a welcome email is sent to the customer; set Send Welcome Email to false to suppress it. Returns the contact's updated list of granted offer identifiers.

actions.name: Revoke Offer from Contact
actions.description: Revokes a previously granted offer from a contact, removing their access to the offer's products. Returns the contact's updated list of remaining granted offer identifiers.

actions.name: List Products
actions.description: Lists active (non-archived) products for a Kajabi site that can be granted to contacts. Returns JSON:API product resources including title, description, status, and member counts, plus pagination.

actions.name: Get Product
actions.description: Retrieves a single product by ID, returning its full JSON:API resource including title, description, status, and member counts. Use List Products to discover product IDs.

actions.name: List Courses
actions.description: Lists courses for a Kajabi site with optional title/description filters and publish-status filtering. Returns JSON:API course resources including title, description, and thumbnail, plus pagination.

actions.name: Get Course
actions.description: Retrieves a single course by ID, returning its full JSON:API resource including title, description, and thumbnail. Include related modules, lessons, or offers via the Include parameter to expand the response.

actions.name: List Tags
actions.description: Lists contact tags for a Kajabi site, with an optional name filter. Returns JSON:API contact-tag resources (id and name) plus pagination. Use tag IDs with Add Tag to Contact and Remove Tag from Contact. Note: Kajabi's public API does not support creating tags; tags are managed in the Kajabi dashboard.

actions.name: Get Tag
actions.description: Retrieves a single contact tag by ID, returning its JSON:API resource (id and name). Use List Tags to discover tag IDs.

actions.name: List Purchases
actions.description: Lists purchases (offer grants a contact has bought or received) for a Kajabi site, with filters for active/deactivated status, referrer, coupon code, and customer. Returns JSON:API purchase resources plus pagination.

actions.name: Get Purchase
actions.description: Retrieves a single purchase by ID, returning its full JSON:API resource. Use List Purchases to discover purchase IDs.

actions.name: List Orders
actions.description: Lists orders for a Kajabi site, with filters for customer, order number, and fulfillment status. Returns JSON:API order resources plus pagination.

actions.name: Get Order
actions.description: Retrieves a single order by ID, returning its full JSON:API resource including order number and timestamps. Use List Orders to discover order IDs.

actions.name: List Forms
actions.description: Lists opt-in and marketing forms for a Kajabi site, with an optional title filter. Returns JSON:API form resources plus pagination.

actions.name: Get Form
actions.description: Retrieves a single form by ID, returning its full JSON:API resource. Use List Forms to discover form IDs.

actions.name: List Webhooks
actions.description: Lists webhooks (hooks) configured for a Kajabi site. Returns JSON:API hook resources including target URL and subscribed event, plus pagination.

actions.name: Create Webhook
actions.description: Creates a webhook (hook) on a Kajabi site that delivers events to your target URL. Choose the event to subscribe to; optionally provide a Resource ID (for example a contact tag ID) to filter to a specific resource, or leave it blank to receive all events of that type. Requires that your API credentials have the scopes for the chosen event. Returns the created JSON:API hook resource.

actions.name: Get Webhook
actions.description: Retrieves a single webhook (hook) by ID, returning its target URL and subscribed event. Use List Webhooks to discover webhook IDs.

actions.name: Delete Webhook
actions.description: Deletes a webhook (hook) by ID so it stops delivering events. Returns a confirmation object with the deleted webhook ID.

idealUseCases: Sync new or updated Kajabi contacts into a CRM or email marketing platform
Automatically grant an offer (enroll a student) when a contact completes an external purchase or form
Tag and segment contacts based on activity tracked in other systems
Log new orders and purchases into a spreadsheet or reporting pipeline
Register webhooks so downstream flows can react to Kajabi events
agentIdeas: Use **HubSpot** "Get Contact By Email" to check a lead, then call Kajabi **Create Contact** and **Grant Offer to Contact** to enroll them in a course after a deal closes.
After a Kajabi **List Orders** or **List Purchases** run, use **Google Sheets** "Add Rows" to log each order into a revenue-tracking spreadsheet.
When a new Kajabi contact is found via **List Contacts**, use **Mailchimp** "Add Or Update List Member" to sync them into an email list and **Slack** "Send Message To Channel" to notify your team.
